title: Disenchanter Multiblock
description: Datapack adding a configuration of blocks and decoration entities for disenchantment to book
body:
## Datapack for constructable disenchanter multiblock

### Feature(s)
Consctructable multiblock for transferring enchantments from tool/armor to book


### Construction

Setup:
```
Ю|
>
```


Ю: minecraft:grindstone (any direction)

\>: minecraft:lectern (any direction)

\|: minecraft:item_frame (on grindstone, anywhere)


### Use guide

Put tool in item frame

Put writable book in lectern

→ Enchanted book with tool enchantments pops out
